statement.en: Evidence supporting enhanced and expanded RSV immunization in young children
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document is embargoed thesis (2026-04-25) with abstract withheld; claims about RSV immunization efficacy are provisional pending full peer review, clinical validation, and publication in indexed venues. The computational category tag (cs.AI) appears misaligned with immunological content, suggesting possible metadata error or computational modeling component not yet visible.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間とともに積み重ねられた免疫の粒子が、未来の病気を幽かに退ける。
